findings.message: decision Proposed implementation plan for JUnit XML and SARIF formats (Issue #444) and updated task.md checklist.
decision Proposed implementation plan for GitHub Actions marketplace action (Issue #443) and updated task.md checklist.
decision Implemented action.yml, entrypoint.sh, updated Dockerfile, and added test_github_action.py to support GitHub Actions Integration.

pitfall When testing bash wrappers in python, make sure to mock -c (inline Python execution) correctly so that scripts redirecting stdout to file parser logic parse mock structures instead of returning empty results.
